message:
feat(core): semantic shock response & operator alerts (ft-344j8.15)

SemanticShockResponder translates conformal anomaly shocks into
actionable user protection. Two modes:
- Alert: records shock, surfaces for TUI display, sends desktop notification
- Pause: additionally revokes command execution via TraumaDecision

Features:
- Per-pane shock tracking with configurable max/eviction
- Notification cooldown to prevent alert fatigue
- Auto-clear expired shocks after configurable timeout
- TraumaDecision integration for PolicyEngine command gating
- NotificationPayload builder for desktop/webhook notifications
- SemanticShockSafetyConfig in ft.toml [safety.semantic_shock]

33 tests covering config, detection handling, pause/alert modes,
cooldown, clear, boundary cases, serde, and multi-pane isolation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
